# BlueprintReader MCP â€” Tool Catalog

<!-- GENERATED by `BlueprintReaderMcp --dump-tools` â€” do not edit by hand.
     Regenerate: Plugins/BlueprintReader/Scripts/Dump-Tools.ps1 -->

**267 tools** across 23 categories. Progressive disclosure advertises only a small `core` subset on `tools/list` by default; use `enable_tool_category` / `call_tool` to reach the rest (see [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)). Full input/output schemas: `docs/tools.json`.

## anim  (6)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_anim_state` | Add a state to a named state machine inside a UAnimBlueprint. NOT to be confused with `add_state_tree_state` (StateTree). Scaffold only â€” final state authoring still uses the AnimGraph editor. |
| `compile_anim_blueprint` | Compile a UAnimBlueprint. |
| `list_anim_blueprints` | List UAnimBlueprint assets under a content path. |
| `list_anim_montages` | List UAnimMontage assets under a content path (default `/Game`). Returns asset_path and name per montage. Use `read_anim_montage` for sections, notifies, and slot tracks. |
| `read_anim_blueprint` | Walk a UAnimBlueprint: parent class + each state machine's states (state / conduit / transition / entry). |
| `read_anim_montage` | Read a UAnimMontage: sections (name, start_time, next_section), notifies (name, trigger_time, duration, notify_class), slot tracks (slot_name, anim segments with anim_sequence path). Essential for ... |

## asset  (10)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `create_folder` | Create a content-browser folder under `/Game/`. Idempotent â€” returns `{already_existed:true}` when the folder is already present. |
| `delete_asset` | Delete an asset. Refuses by default if other assets reference it; set `force=true` to delete anyway (leaves dangling references as null objects). Returns the list of referencing assets when the ref... |
| `duplicate_blueprint` | File-level duplicate: source BP at `asset_path` â†’ new BP at `dest_asset_path`. Both must be under /Game/. Idempotent: if the destination already exists, returns {ok:true, already_existed:true} wi... |
| `get_dependencies` | Return every asset (package path) that this asset DEPENDS on. Inverse of `get_referencers`. Useful for understanding what loads when this asset loads. |
| `get_project_metadata` | Read the project's `.uproject` file and return parsed metadata (project name, EngineAssociation, category, description, plus the raw JSON for anything else). Useful for orienting an agent to which ... |
| `get_referencers` | Return every asset (package path) that REFERENCES this asset. Useful for impact analysis before renaming, deleting, or refactoring. Sourced from the asset registry's dependency graph (in-memory; fa... |
| `move_asset` | Move or rename an asset. `dest_asset_path` is the full destination package path â€” pass the same folder with a different leaf for a rename, or a different folder to move. Both must be under `/Game... |
| `read_config_value` | Read a UE config (.ini) value. `file` is one of "Engine" (default), "Game", "Input", "Editor", "EditorPerProjectIni", or a full path. Returns `{exists, value}` â€” `exists:false` if the key isn't s... |
| `save_all` | Save every dirty package the editor has loaded. With `dirty_only=true` (default), clean packages are skipped â€” fast no-op when nothing's changed. `scope` defaults to "touched": only packages THIS... |
| `set_config_value` | Write a UE config (.ini) value + flush to disk. `file` defaults to Engine (DefaultEngine.ini). Returns `{previous_value, value}` so the caller can verify the change. **Destructive** â€” writes the ... |

## assets  (3)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `find_asset` | Find assets whose name or package path contains `query` (case-insensitive). Scoped to `path` (defaults to /Game). Use this instead of shelling out to `Get-ChildItem` / `find` â€” asset registry is ... |
| `list_assets` | List every asset (any UClass) under `path`. Asset-registry-backed; O(1) per asset. Use when you don't know the asset's UClass â€” reach for `list_blueprints` / `list_materials` / etc. instead when ... |
| `read_actor_instance` | Read ANY object instance by package path â€” including a level-placed actor stored in its own external package under `/<Mount>/__ExternalActors__/...` (World Partition / One-File-Per-Actor), which ... |

## behavior tree  (5)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_bt_node` | Add a node (composite/decorator/service/task) to a UBehaviorTree. NOT for Blueprint graph nodes (`add_node`). `node_kind` is `composite` / `decorator` / `service` / `task`; `node_class` is the shor... |
| `compile_behavior_tree` | Compile a behavior tree (recompiles + marks the asset dirty). Returns `{compiled: true\|false}`. |
| `list_behavior_trees` | List UBehaviorTree assets under a content path (default `/Game`). |
| `read_behavior_tree` | Walk a UBehaviorTree's node graph. Returns every node (id, class, kind, parent) and the root node id. |
| `set_bt_node_property` | Set a UPROPERTY on a UBehaviorTree node (e.g. MoveTo's `AcceptableRadius`, Blackboard decorator's `KeyName`). `value` is the property's text form. |

## blueprint  (39)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_component` | Add a component (StaticMeshComponent, AudioComponent, etc.) to a Blueprint's SimpleConstructionScript tree â€” author-time component setup, not runtime spawning. For runtime actor spawning use `spa... |
| `add_function` | Create a new BP function graph with the given name. Returns {ok, function_name, already_existed}. Use add_function_input / add_function_output to declare its signature. Idempotent â€” calling with ... |
| `add_function_input` | Add an input parameter to an existing function. `type` accepts either a shorthand string (e.g. "float", "object:Actor") or a BPPinType object. |
| `add_function_output` | Add an output parameter to an existing function. Spawns a FunctionResult node if there isn't one yet. `type` accepts either a shorthand string (e.g. "float", "object:Actor") or a BPPinType object. |
| `add_node` | Spawn a new K2 (Blueprint) node in a graph. For non-K2 nodes use the typed tools instead (add_widget / add_bt_node / add_anim_state / add_state_tree_state / add_material_expression / add_sequence_t... |
| `add_variable` | Add a member variable to a Blueprint class. For graph nodes use `add_node`; for function parameters use `add_function_input`/`add_function_output`. `type` accepts either a shorthand string ("float"... |
| `apply_ops` | Execute a batch of write operations sequentially in a single tool call. Each op is `{op:"add_variable"\|...\|"wire_pins", ...args}`. Reduces N round-trips and N agent reasoning steps to one. |
| `attach_component` | Re-parent an SCS component on a Blueprint. Pass `new_parent` to attach the component as a child of that node; pass empty to attach at the SCS root. `socket` applies to SceneComponent children only. |
| `auto_layout_graph` | Auto-position the nodes in a Blueprint graph so they don't overlap. v1 is a column-grid layout computed from exec connectivity â€” readable but not as tidy as UE's built-in graph-tidy. Plugin-side ... |
| `bp_structural_diff` | Compare two Blueprints structurally â€” variables, components, function/macro/event-graph node signatures, connection counts. Returns {ok, differences[]}. Position- and GUID-independent so a freshl... |
| `clone_graph` | Copy every node in `graph` from the `source` Blueprint into the same-named graph of the `target` Blueprint, preserving wiring. The `target` must already have a graph named `graph` (create the funct... |
| `create_blueprint` | Create a new Blueprint asset under `/Game/...` extending `parent_class`. `parent_class` accepts short names ("Actor", "ACharacter") and full UClass paths ("/Script/Engine.Actor"). Idempotent: calli... |
| `delete_function` | Delete a Blueprint function graph by name. |
| `delete_node` | Delete a K2 node by GUID. Breaks any links into/out of it. Recompiles + saves. |
| `delete_variable` | Remove a Blueprint member variable by name. Recompiles + saves. |
| `find_dangling_references` | Walk a Blueprint's function bodies (and optionally top-level graphs) for nodes referencing variables / intra-BP functions that no longer exist on the BP. Catches the renamed-or-deleted-but-node-sti... |
| `find_node` | Search all nodes in a Blueprint by class name or title substring (case-insensitive) â€” searches ALL graphs at once, unlike `get_graph` which reads one named graph. Use this to answer "does this BP... |
| `find_overriders` | Find Blueprints under `path` that match a structural query: extend `parent_class`, override `function_name`, and/or implement `interface`. All filters are optional but at least one must be set. Ret... |
| `get_components` | List the SCS components (StaticMeshComponent, LightComponent, child actors, etc.) attached to a blueprint, with parent/child hierarchy. Each entry: {name, class, parent, is_root}. Supports `fields`... |
| `get_function` | Fetch a specific Blueprint function by name: signature (inputs, outputs, locals) + body graph. Use when you know the function name and want its full definition. For unknown function names, use `fin... |
| `get_graph` | Fetch a Blueprint graph by name (default: EventGraph). Use this when you need to see specific node wiring â€” inputs/outputs, execution flow, or connected pins. For a quick structural overview (nod... |
| `get_node` | Fetch a single K2 node by GUID inside a graph. Returns the node's class, title, position, pins, and links â€” same shape as one entry from `get_graph`'s nodes array, minus the round-trip cost of fe... |
| `implement_interface` | Add `interface` to the implemented-interfaces list of the `asset` Blueprint, generating the stub function graphs the interface requires. `interface` accepts a BP-interface package path (/Game/...) ... |
| `list_blueprints` | List Blueprint assets under a content path. Defaults to /Game. On big projects this can return thousands of entries â€” use `limit`/`offset` to page, and `fields` (e.g. ["asset_path"]) to drop colu... |
| `list_timelines` | List all Timeline nodes in a Blueprint (names, track counts, length, loop, auto_play). Quick summary â€” use `read_timeline` for track keys. |
| `list_variables` | List all member variables on a Blueprint, with type, default, category, and replication state. Big BPs can have 100+ variables â€” use `fields` (e.g. ["name", "type.category"]) and `limit`/`offset`... |
| `peek_graph` | Lightweight probe for a Blueprint graph â€” returns node count + kind histogram + connection count without any node/pin/connection detail. Use before `get_graph` to decide whether a graph is worth ... |
| `read_blueprint` | Read top-level metadata for a Blueprint: parent class, interfaces, variables, function/graph summaries, macros. Pass `fields` (e.g. ["parent_class", "variables[].name"]) to project just what you ne... |
| `read_timeline` | Read a Timeline from a Blueprint: float/vector/event/linear_color tracks with their FRichCurveKey arrays (time, value, interp). Provide `timeline_name` to select one; omit to read the first timeline. |
| `remove_component` | Remove a component from a Blueprint's SCS tree by name. Returns `{removed:false}` when the component isn't found. |
| `rename_variable` | Rename a Blueprint member variable. Updates references in graphs. Recompiles + saves. |
| `retype_variable` | Change a Blueprint member variable's type without delete + re-add. UE rewires every VariableGet / VariableSet node that references the variable in place â€” existing graphs survive. For a brand-new... |
| `set_component_property` | Set a UPROPERTY on a Blueprint component's template (the author-time default values, what the BP Details panel shows for that component). For widget UPROPERTYs use `set_widget_property`; for behavi... |
| `set_node_position` | Move a K2 node (by GUID) to (x, y) inside a Blueprint graph. Recompiles + saves the BP. |
| `set_pin_default` | Set the literal default value on a node's input pin. UE has no first-class literal node â€” values flow in as the consumer pin's default. `pin` accepts a pin GUID (preferred â€” get_graph) or a pin... |
| `set_variable_category` | Change the My-Blueprint-panel category label on a Blueprint member variable (the "Stats" / "Combat" group header in the BP editor). Empty `category` clears the label back to default. For a brand-ne... |
| `set_variable_default` | Change a Blueprint member variable's default value (string form, as displayed in the Details panel â€” e.g. "100.0" for a float, "true"/"false" for a bool). Pass empty string to clear. |
| `summarize_blueprint` | Tiny orientation response for a Blueprint: parent class plus counts of variables, functions, graphs, macros, and interfaces. Use this BEFORE `read_blueprint` when you don't yet know how big the BP ... |
| `wire_pins` | Connect two K2 pins. `from_pin` and `to_pin` accept either a pin GUID (preferred â€” see get_graph) or a pin name. The schema's pin compatibility rules are enforced; on failure, the error message i... |

## class info  (3)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `find_class` | Search the UClass registry by substring. Returns an array of class names matching `query` (case-insensitive). Compiler-generated companion classes (`SKEL_*`, `REINST_*`, `TRASHCLASS_*`) are filtere... |
| `get_class_info` | Inspect a UClass: parent + ancestor chain + every UPROPERTY + UFUNCTION. `class_name` is the short class name (e.g. `Actor`, `PlayerController`) or a full class path. |
| `list_functions` | List every UFUNCTION on a class with its flags (BlueprintCallable, BlueprintPure, etc.). Cheaper projection than `get_class_info` when you only need the call surface. |

## cook  (2)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `cook_content` | Run UE's content cook for a target platform (`Windows`, `Linux`, etc.). Asynchronous; the tool returns once the cook is dispatched. Follow progress via `read_output_log` or the editor's Cook Status... |
| `package_project` | Package the project for a target platform via UAT. `output_dir` is where the packaged build lands. Async â€” tool returns once UAT is dispatched. |

## cpp  (8)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `compile_function` | Compile a tiny pseudocode DSL into a fully-wired Blueprint function. Accepts the function signature plus a `body` of statements; translates to add_node + wire_pins + set_pin_default ops and runs th... |
| `decompile_blueprint` | Whole-class BPIR extraction: variables + interfaces + every function's BPIR. Returns `{kind: "class", ...}` doc â€” the input shape `transpile_blueprint` expects for full UCLASS C++ generation. Per... |
| `decompile_function` | Convert a BP function to BPIR (Blueprint Intermediate Representation) â€” a versioned JSON AST that's the pivot for BP â†” source-language conversions. Pattern-matches K2 nodes (Branch / Cast / Seq... |
| `generate_k2node_skeleton` | Generate a compilable .h/.cpp skeleton for a custom UK2Node subclass: AllocateDefaultPins from your pin spec (exec pins added automatically unless `pure`), GetMenuActions (UBlueprintNodeSpawner reg... |
| `parse_cpp_function` | Parse a C++ function (or bare body) into a BPIR document â€” the inverse of `transpile_function`. The returned BPIR can be fed straight to `compile_function` to materialize a BP graph from the source. |
| `transpile_blueprint` | Convert a whole Blueprint class to a compilable UE C++ .h/.cpp pair. Composes decompile_blueprint + CppClassEmit: emits a UCLASS declaration with UPROPERTY decls (Replicated / EditAnywhere / Catego... |
| `transpile_function` | Convert a Blueprint function to C++ source. Composes decompile_function (BP â†’ BPIR) + C++ codegen (BPIR â†’ source). Default `mode=readable` emits annotated C++ (type names + valid blocks, UCLASS... |
| `write_generated_source` | Write a transpiled .h/.cpp file into the project's Source/ tree. Confined by the plugin to paths under <ProjectDir>/Source/ â€” anything else is rejected. Pair with `transpile_blueprint`: pass the ... |

## data asset  (4)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `create_data_asset` | Create a new UDataAsset instance. `class_name` is the short C++ class name (or BP path) of a UDataAsset subclass. |
| `list_data_assets` | List all UDataAsset subclass instances under a content path. Mirrors `list_blueprints` but filters by base class. |
| `read_data_asset` | Read every UPROPERTY on a UDataAsset. Returns the asset's class + a `{property: stringified_value}` map. |
| `set_data_asset_property` | Set a UPROPERTY on a UDataAsset instance. `value` is the text form UE's property system uses. |

## data table  (4)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_data_row` | Add a row to an existing DataTable. The row name must be unique within the table; existing names return `{already_existed:true}` unless `overwrite:true` is passed. `values` is an object whose keys ... |
| `list_data_tables` | List all UDataTable assets under a content path. Mirrors `list_blueprints` but filters for UDataTable. Defaults to `/Game`. |
| `read_data_table` | Load a DataTable and return its row-struct type, column names, and every row's field values. Useful for orienting an agent to an existing data table before mutating it. |
| `set_data_row_value` | Update a single field on an existing DataTable row. `field_name` must match a property on the row struct; `value` is its string form (ImportText input). Returns the pre-set and post-set ExportText'... |

## diff  (2)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `diff_asset` | Structural diff between two Blueprint assets. Returns the list of differences (added/removed/changed variables, components, functions, graphs, parent class) as a machine-readable array. Use this be... |
| `prepare_merge` | AI-assisted merge context. Computes base->mine and base->theirs diffs, identifies conflicts (same path touched by both), and returns a structured merge context the AI can reason over. After reviewi... |

## discover  (3)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `list_node_kinds` | List the `kind` values that `add_node` accepts, with required extras for each. Pure metadata â€” no backend call. |
| `list_pin_categories` | List the canonical BPPinType.category values + container modifiers. Useful when constructing the `type` argument for add_variable. Pure metadata â€” no backend call. |
| `shutdown_daemon` | Force-terminate the backing editor daemon process. In shared-daemon mode (the default), one daemon serves every MCP session against a given project â€” so this affects EVERY session, not just yours... |

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `activate_game_feature` | Request activation of a Game Feature Plugin by name or file:-protocol URL (async, fire-and-forget). `requested:true` means load+activate was queued; poll `get_game_feature_state` to confirm. `reque... |
| `build_lighting` | Trigger a lighting build (Lightmass) on the currently-loaded level. Async â€” returns once the build is QUEUED, not once it finishes. `quality` is one of "Preview", "Medium", "High", "Production" (... |
| `close_asset_editor` | Close all editor windows for the given asset. Idempotent â€” closing an asset with no editor open is a no-op (`closed:false`, no error). `asset_path` is package form. Returns `{closed, asset_path}`... |
| `console_command` | Execute a UE console command (e.g. `stat unit`, `showflag.bones 1`, `r.ScreenPercentage 75`). Returns whatever the command echoed to the log. |
| `deactivate_game_feature` | Request deactivation of a Game Feature Plugin by name or file:-protocol URL (async, fire-and-forget). `requested:true` means deactivation was queued; poll `get_game_feature_state` to confirm. `requ... |
| `delete_actor` | Destroy an actor by name. Returns `{deleted: false}` if the actor wasn't found. |
| `focus_actor` | Frame an actor in the editor viewport â€” equivalent to clicking the actor and pressing F. `actor_name` is the actor's level label. |
| `get_active_asset` | Asset whose editor was most recently activated â€” the one the user is most likely focused on. Returns `{asset_path, asset_class, last_activation_seconds}`. `asset_path` is empty when no asset edit... |
| `get_active_cook_target` | List the editor's active cook target platforms and the running platform, via ITargetPlatformManagerModule. `platforms` is the set UBT/the cooker would target; `running_platform` is the host the edi... |
| `get_active_culture` | Active editor culture/language: `{language, culture, display_name}` (e.g. en / en-US / "English (United States)"). Requires a live editor. |
| `get_active_editor_mode` | Active level-editor mode(s) â€” what tool is the user working in? Returns `{active_modes: [...]}`. Common modes: `EM_Default` (selection), `EM_Placement`, `EM_Landscape`, `EM_Foliage`, `EM_MeshPain... |
| `get_active_notifications` | Active toast notifications (FSlateNotificationManager). v1 stub: the manager exposes no public enumeration of live notifications â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_active_stats` | Stat overlays enabled in the active level viewport (e.g. `Unit`, `FPS`, `GPU`, `SceneRendering`) via FViewportClient::GetEnabledStats. `valid:false` when no viewport is focused. Requires a live edi... |
| `get_active_viewport` | Which level viewport has focus right now (1/2/4 layout). Returns `{valid, viewport_index, is_perspective, size_x, size_y}`. `viewport_index` is 0-based across the level-editor viewport clients; `is... |
| `get_anim_editor_state` | Persona / animation editor selection state. v1 is a documented stub returning `valid:false` for all paths â€” surfacing the wire shape `{valid, asset_path, selected_bone_index, selected_socket_name... |
| `get_asset_registry_state` | Asset-registry scan status: `{is_loading_assets, search_all_assets}`. `is_loading_assets:true` means the background scan is still running (asset queries may be incomplete). Requires a live editor. |
| `get_async_compile_state` | Async asset-compilation backlog (textures, static meshes, etc.) via FAssetCompilingManager. `remaining_assets` is the aggregate still compiling; 0 means idle. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_autosave_status` | Editor autosave status: `{is_auto_saving}` (true while an autosave is in progress). Requires a live editor. |
| `get_blueprint_breakpoints` | Breakpoints set on a Blueprint (FKismetDebugUtilities). Each: `{node_guid, node_name, location, enabled}`. `valid:false` when the BP can't be loaded. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_blueprint_editor_state` | Per-Blueprint-editor state for the named BP asset. Returns `{valid, asset_path, current_graph_name, compile_status, selected_node_ids}`. `selected_node_ids` are FGuid strings; empty when no nodes s... |
| `get_buffer_visualization_mode` | Active level viewport's buffer-visualization override (`base_color`, `roughness`, `normals`, `metallic`, etc.). Returns `{valid, mode}`. Empty `mode` means no override â€” the viewport renders in i... |
| `get_camera_bookmarks` | Saved viewport camera bookmarks (Ctrl-1..9 poses) from the world settings. Returns only populated slots: `{slot, loc_x/y/z, pitch, yaw, roll}`. `max_slots` is the allocated bookmark array size. Pai... |
| `get_camera_transform` | Read the active level viewport's camera state. Picks the focused level viewport (or first perspective if none has focus). Returns `{valid, loc_x/y/z, pitch/yaw/roll, fov}`. `valid:false` means no l... |
| `get_cinematic_camera` | Currently-active camera in PIE â€” reads `APlayerCameraManager::GetViewTarget()` from the first PIE player controller. Returns `{valid, actor_name, loc_x/y/z, pitch/yaw/roll, fov}`. `valid:false` w... |
| `get_compile_status` | Blueprint compile status â€” wraps `UBlueprint::Status` into a stable string. Useful after a write op to confirm the BP is compile-clean before further mutations. Values: "uncompiled", "dirty", "go... |
| `get_content_browser_path` | The folder the Content Browser is currently displaying (its address-bar path). Returns `{current_path}`. Empty when no path is selected. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_cook_progress` | In-editor cook progress. v1 stub: no in-editor cook session exists to report by default, and there's no clean progress API â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_current_level` | The editor's current level (where newly-spawned actors land) + owning world. Names are package paths. `valid:false` means no editor world. Requires a live editor. |

| `get_cvar` | Read a console variable's current value. Returns `{exists, value, help}` â€” `exists:false` if the CVar isn't registered. |
| `get_data_layer_states` | World Partition data layers + per-layer effective runtime state (Unloaded/Loaded/Activated). Each: `{short_name, full_name, runtime_state}`. `has_world_partition:false` on non-partitioned maps (lay... |
| `get_ddc_state` | Derived Data Cache state/usage. v1 stub: the DDC interface exposes only get/put, no public usage-stats accessor â€” returns valid:false. |

| `get_details_panel_state` | Details panel UI state (search filter, expanded categories, pinned properties). v1 stub: this is transient SDetailsView state not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. (Selected objects a... |
| `get_dirty_packages` | List loaded packages with unsaved changes. Pairs with `save_all` â€” agents that just mutated multiple BPs use this to confirm there's nothing unsaved before disconnecting. Each entry flags `is_con... |

| `get_editor_state` | One-call situational awareness: what assets are open in the editor (which is active), the currently-loaded level and its dirty state, the viewport camera transform, currently-selected actors, and w... |
| `get_editor_theme` | Current editor theme id (`UEditorStyleSettings::CurrentAppliedTheme` GUID). Dark/Light ship with fixed GUIDs; custom themes get their own. Agents can detect theme changes by id. Requires a live edi... |
| `get_file_lock_status` | Whether an asset is checked out / locked by another user: `{valid, checked_out_by_other, other_user}`. Reads cached SCC state. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_focused_widget` | Slate widget the user is currently typing into / focused on. Finer-grained than get_focused_window: "the user is in the BP graph search box" vs "the user is on the BP editor window". Returns `{widg... |
| `get_focused_window` | Title + Slate widget-class of the currently-focused top-level window. Useful for "is the user in the BP editor right now?" routing. Returns `{title, class_name}`. Both empty when no Slate window ha... |
| `get_foliage_paint_state` | Foliage edit mode paint state (selected foliage types, brush settings). v1 stub: foliage mode state is not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_game_feature_state` | Look up a single Game Feature Plugin's state by name (case-insensitive match against `plugin_name`). Returns `{valid, plugin_name, plugin_url, state}`. `valid:false` when the plugin name doesn't re... |
| `get_gizmo_state` | Translation gizmo state for the active level viewport. Returns `{valid, mode, coord_space}`. `mode` is `translate` / `rotate` / `scale` / `translaterotatez` / `2d` / `none`. `coord_space` is `world... |
| `get_hidden_actors` | Names of actors hidden in the editor viewport (temporary or level hide). Capped at 500 â€” `truncated:true` signals a larger hidden set. Sorted by iteration order, not by name. Pair with `set_actor... |
| `get_hidden_layers` | Names of editor layers whose visibility is off (`ULayersSubsystem`). Capped at 500 â€” `truncated:true` signals a larger set. Pair with `set_layer_visibility` to toggle. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_hover_target` | Hit-proxy target under the cursor (actor/surface/component). v1 stub: resolving the hit proxy needs a render-thread readback + RTTI cross-cast that isn't safe out-of-process â€” returns `valid:fals... |
| `get_isolate_mode` | Show-only-selected / isolate mode state (UE 5.6+). v1 stub: no stable public accessor for the level-viewport isolate flag â€” returns `valid:false`. Shape is stable. |
| `get_landscape_paint_state` | Landscape edit mode paint state (active brush/target layer). v1 stub: landscape mode state is not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_lighting_build_progress` | Static lighting build progress. v1 stub: no clean global lighting-build progress accessor â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_live_coding_state` | Live Coding (C++ hot-patch) state: `{available, has_started, is_compiling}`. `available:false` on non-Windows or when the module isn't loaded. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_material_editor_state` | Material editor selection state. Returns `{valid, asset_path, selected_node_count, selected_expression_classes}`. `selected_expression_classes` lists short class names of currently-selected materia... |
| `get_material_instance_params` | Dump scalar/vector/texture parameter values from a UMaterialInstanceConstant asset. No open editor required â€” reads parameters directly from the asset. Returns `{valid, asset_path, parent_path, s... |
| `get_mesh_paint_state` | Mesh paint mode state (color/weight/texture sub-mode, selected channel). v1 stub: mesh-paint mode state is not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_mesh_preview_state` | Static mesh editor preview state: forced LOD level and currently-displayed LOD index. `current_lod_level` is -1 when on auto-LOD; an explicit integer otherwise. `current_lod_index` is the LOD being... |
| `get_modal_state` | Is a modal Slate window blocking input right now? Returns `{is_open, title, buttons, buttons_truncated}` â€” `buttons` lists the modal's SButtons as `[{path, label?}]` so you can see what answers t... |
| `get_modeling_state` | Modeling Tools Editor Mode state (active tool, sub-element selection mode: vertex/edge/face/group). v1 stub: this is interactive-tools-context state internal to the mode manager, not bridged out-of... |
| `get_monitor_info` | Connected monitors (FDisplayMetrics): each `{name, native_width, native_height, is_primary}`. Useful for multi-monitor placement reasoning. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_niagara_module_selection` | Niagara system / emitter / module editor selection. v1 is a documented stub returning `valid:false` for all paths. Niagara editors use specialized toolkit types in the Niagara plugin's editor modul... |
| `get_outliner_state` | World Outliner UI state (search text, type filter, row expansion, columns). v1 stub: outliner state lives in transient Slate widgets not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_pending_changelist` | The default/pending source-control changelist. v1 stub: Perforce-centric (empty for Git/None) â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_pie_state` | Is Play-In-Editor running right now? Returns `{is_playing, mode, instance_count}`. `mode` is the PIE mode string (selected_viewport / new_editor_window / standalone / vr_preview) or empty when not ... |
| `get_pinned_actors` | Actors pinned in the World Outliner. v1 stub: pin state is Slate-widget-local and not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_plugin_dependencies` | Plugins that `plugin_name` depends on (extracted from the `Plugins:` array in its descriptor). Returns `{valid, dependencies: [plugin_name, ...]}`. Useful for understanding dependency chains before... |
| `get_plugin_descriptor` | Read the full .uplugin descriptor for `plugin_name`. Returns `{valid, descriptor}` where `descriptor` is the raw parsed JSON from the .uplugin file (UE's FPluginDescriptor schema â€” name, version,... |
| `get_project_setting_values` | All property values of one settings section (UDeveloperSettings CDO), each `{name, value, type}` where `value` is the reflection-exported text. `class_path` comes from `list_project_settings`. `val... |
| `get_recently_opened_assets` | Recently-opened assets from the editor MRU list, most-recent first (package paths). Reflects the current editor session's history. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_recently_saved_packages` | Packages saved during this editor session, most-recent first (package paths). Backed by a ring buffer populated from the package-saved event â€” empty in a fresh headless commandlet, accumulates in... |
| `get_recovery_state` | Crash-recovery state: `{has_packages_to_restore}` (true when autosave restore files are pending from a prior unclean shutdown). Requires a live editor. |
| `get_render_queue` | Movie Render Queue pending jobs. v1 stub: a real implementation must link the MovieRenderPipeline plugin module â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_selected_actors` | List the names of currently-selected actors in the level editor. Names are the stable in-package names (not display labels). Empty array when nothing is selected. |
| `get_selected_assets` | Currently-selected assets in the Content Browser. Returns `{asset_paths: [/Game/AI/BP_Foo, ...]}` (package form). Multi-select preserved in order. Empty when nothing selected. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_selected_components` | Components owned by each currently-selected actor. Returns `[{actor_name, components: [{name, component_class}]}]`. Empty actors array when nothing is selected. Useful when an agent wants to operat... |
| `get_selected_folders` | Currently-selected folder paths in the Content Browser tree (distinct from assets â€” folders are navigation rows). Returns `{folder_paths: [...]}` in package form. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_sequencer_state` | Sequencer state for an open ULevelSequence editor. Returns `{valid, asset_path, playhead_seconds, playback_status, playback_range_start_seconds, playback_range_end_seconds}`. `playback_status` is o... |
| `get_shader_compile_state` | Shader-compilation backlog via GShaderCompilingManager: `{is_compiling, outstanding_jobs, pending_jobs}`. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_show_flags` | Read the active level viewport's commonly-toggled show flags. Returns a curated subset of FEngineShowFlags' ~100 fields: wireframe, collision, grid, bounds, navigation, atmosphere, fog, lighting, p... |
| `get_snapping_settings` | Editor snapping settings: grid + rotation snap toggles, current grid sizes (position + rotation), vertex snapping, snap-to-actor distance. Reads `ULevelEditorViewportSettings`. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_source_control_provider` | Active source-control provider: `{name, enabled, available}`. `name` is e.g. "Git"/"Perforce"/"None". Requires a live editor. |
| `get_source_control_status` | Per-file source-control status (cached): `{valid, controlled, checked_out, checked_out_other, modified, current}`. `valid:false` when SCC is disabled or the file has no cached state. Reads cached s... |
| `get_static_mesh_info` | Static mesh LOD / triangle / vertex info. Reads directly from the UStaticMesh asset â€” no editor instance needed. Returns `{valid, asset_path, lod_count, is_nanite_enabled, lods: [{triangle_count,... |
| `get_status_bar_messages` | Active status-bar message text. v1 stub: the status bar API is push-only (no public getter) â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_streaming_sources` | World Partition streaming sources (camera/player providers driving cell streaming). Each: `{name, loc_x/y/z, pitch, yaw, roll}`. `has_world_partition:false` on non-partitioned maps (sources empty).... |
| `get_take_recorder_state` | Take Recorder state (recording active, current take). v1 stub: a real implementation must link the TakeRecorder plugin module (UTakeRecorder::GetActiveRecorder) â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_texture_paint_state` | Texture paint mode state (selected texture/UV channel). v1 stub: texture-paint mode state is not bridged out-of-process â€” returns valid:false. |
| `get_trace_state` | Unreal Insights trace connection state via FTraceAuxiliary (Core): `connected`, `paused`, `connection_type` (network\|file\|none), `destination` (host or file path), and `active_channels` (comma-se... |
| `get_umg_editor_state` | Selection state for a UMG Widget Blueprint editor. Returns `{valid, asset_path, selected_widget_names, current_designer_tab}`. `selected_widget_names` are the template-side widget names (matching t... |
| `get_view_mode` | Read the active level viewport's view mode (Lit / Unlit / Wireframe / DetailLighting / ShaderComplexity / LightingOnly / ReflectionOverride / VisualizeBuffer / etc.). Returns `{valid, mode}`. Requi... |
| `get_viewport_camera_settings` | Active level viewport's camera settings: FOV, camera speed multiplier, near/far clip planes. Returns `{valid, fov, camera_speed, near_clip, far_clip}`. `far_clip` is 0 when no override is set (engi... |
| `get_viewport_realtime` | Active level viewport's realtime flag â€” whether the viewport renders every frame (true) or only on user interaction (false). Returns `{valid, is_realtime}`. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_visible_actors` | Actors visible in the active level viewport â€” frustum-tested against the camera, filtered by class substring (`class_filter`, case-sensitive) and max distance (`max_distance` in cm; 0 = no limit)... |
| `get_watched_pins` | Watched pins on a Blueprint (FKismetDebugUtilities). Each: `{pin_name, node_guid, node_name, direction}`. `valid:false` when the BP can't be loaded. Requires a live editor. |
| `get_workspace_layout` | The editor's current docking/workspace layout, serialized via FGlobalTabmanager::PersistLayout (`layout` string). Reflects which tabs/panels are open and how they're arranged. Empty when Slate isn'... |
| `goto_camera_bookmark` | Jump the active viewport camera to a saved bookmark slot (0-based). `jumped:false` means the slot is empty or no viewport is focused. View-state only â€” allowed in read-only mode. Requires a live ... |
| `health_check` | Probe whether the live editor is responsive. Answered on the editor's worker thread WITHOUT touching the game thread, so it returns immediately even when the game thread is halted â€” distinguishin... |
| `list_actor_abilities` | Abilities granted to the named actor's `UAbilitySystemComponent`. Returns `{valid, actor_name, abilities: [{ability_class, is_active, level, instanced_count}]}`. `valid:false` when actor doesn't ex... |
| `list_actor_attributes` | Gameplay attributes on the named actor's `UAbilitySystemComponent`. Returns `{valid, actor_name, attributes: [{name, base_value, current_value}]}`. `base_value` is the raw value before active-effec... |
| `list_actor_gameplay_effects` | Active gameplay effects on the named actor's `UAbilitySystemComponent`. Returns `{valid, actor_name, effects: [{effect_class, stack_count, duration_remaining, level, granted_tags}]}`. `duration_rem... |
| `list_actor_gameplay_tags` | Owned gameplay tags on the named actor's `UAbilitySystemComponent`. Union of tags granted by abilities, by effects, and loose tags. Returns `{valid, actor_name, tags: ['Status.Buffed', ...]}`. `val... |
| `list_automation_tests` | Registered automation tests (FAutomationTestFramework, synchronous). Each `{display_name, full_path, test_name}` â€” `full_path`/`test_name` feed the `pattern` arg of `run_automation_tests`. Capped... |
| `list_changelists` | Source-control changelists. v1 stub: changelists are Perforce-centric (ISourceControlProvider::GetChangelists returns empty for Git/None); a real enumeration is pending â€” returns valid:false. |
| `list_desktop_windows` | List visible top-level Slate windows: `{windows: [{title, widget_type, pos_x/y, size_x/y, is_active}]}`. Lighter-weight alternative to a desktop screenshot when an agent just needs to know which wi... |
| `list_game_features` | List all known Game Feature Plugins (GFPs) and their simplified state. Lyra uses GFPs extensively as its modular content mechanism. Returns `{features: [{plugin_name, plugin_url, state}]}`. `state`... |
| `list_loaded_levels` | All loaded levels (persistent + streaming sublevels) as package paths. Requires a live editor. |
| `list_loaded_partition_cells` | Loaded World Partition runtime cells. v1 stub: cell enumeration uses partly-internal WorldPartition runtime-hash APIs not yet wired â€” returns valid:false. (get_streaming_sources + get_world_parti... |
| `list_open_assets` | List every asset the user currently has open in some asset editor (one entry per editor window). Returns `[{asset_path, asset_class, last_activation_seconds}, ...]`. Sort by `last_activation_second... |
| `list_plugins` | Enumerate all discovered plugins via IPluginManager. Returns `{plugins: [{name, descriptor_path, category, version, is_enabled, is_built_in, is_content_only}]}`. Includes both enabled and disabled ... |
| `list_project_settings` | All Project/Editor Settings sections (UDeveloperSettings CDOs): each `{container, category, section, class_path}`. The 3-tier nav read (Container -> Category -> Section) that future get/set/save/re... |
| `live_coding_compile` | Trigger UE's Live Coding compile + patch. The compile runs asynchronously; Live Coding emits its own progress + result to the editor log (use `read_output_log` to follow). |
| `open_asset_editor` | Open the asset editor for the given asset (Blueprint, Material, etc.). Idempotent â€” opening an already-open asset brings the existing editor window to front. `asset_path` is package form: `/Game/... |
| `pie_start` | Start a Play-In-Editor session. `mode` is one of `selected_viewport` (default), `new_editor_window`, `standalone`, `vr_preview`. Requires a rendering-capable (GPU) editor: in a headless (-nullrhi) ... |
| `pie_stop` | End the active PIE session. No-op when PIE isn't running. |
| `read_output_log` | Read recent entries from the editor's output log. The plugin module installs a ring-buffer log sink at startup; this returns up to `limit` of the most recent entries (default 200), optionally filte... |
| `reset_project_setting` | Reset a project setting to its default. v1 stub: a correct factory-reset needs the editor details-panel's default-value resolution â€” a config property's constructor-set default is unrecoverable o... |
| `run_python_script` | Execute an Unreal Python script in the live editor. Wrapped in a single undo transaction so mutations are reversible. **Gated:** the MCP server's process env must include `BP_READER_ALLOW_PYTHON=1`... |
| `screen_to_world` | Inverse of `world_pos_to_screen`. Cast a ray from screen-normalized [0,1] coordinates out to `max_distance` cm in world space. Returns `{valid, hit, world_x, world_y, world_z, hit_actor_name}`. Whe... |
| `set_active_cook_target` | Set the active cook target platforms. v1 stub: ITargetPlatformManager has no runtime setter (active platforms derive from the launch command line) â€” returns valid:false. Read the current set with... |
| `set_actor_transform` | Update a placed actor's world transform in the current level. `actor_name` is from `get_selected_actors` or `spawn_actor`'s response. All transform fields are absolute (not delta). |
| `set_actor_visibility` | Show or hide an actor in the editor viewport by name via `SetIsTemporarilyHiddenInEditor` (does not dirty the package). `valid:false` means no actor with that name was found. Blocked in read-only m... |
| `set_camera_transform` | Move the editor viewport camera to a specific location + rotation. Rotation is in degrees (pitch / yaw / roll). |
| `set_content_browser_path` | Navigate the Content Browser to `folder_path` (package form, e.g. `/Game/AI/Behaviors`). Returns the post-call current_path for verification. Requires a live editor. |
| `set_cvar` | Set a UE console variable (e.g. `r.ScreenPercentage`). Runtime-style; for Blueprint variable defaults use `set_variable_default`. Forces `ECVF_SetByCode` priority â€” overrides values set from ini ... |
| `set_gizmo_mode` | Set the transform gizmo mode in the active level viewport: `translate`, `rotate`, or `scale` (case-insensitive). `valid:false` means no viewport or an unrecognized mode. Read counterpart: `get_gizm... |
| `set_layer_visibility` | Show or hide an editor layer by name (`ULayersSubsystem`). `valid:false` means no layer with that name exists. Blocked in read-only mode (mutates level-domain state). Requires a live editor. |
| `set_plugin_enabled` | Enable or disable a plugin in the project's .uproject descriptor (IProjectManager). `applied` = the descriptor changed; `saved` = the .uproject was written. Takes effect on the next editor restart ... |
| `set_project_setting` | Set one property on a settings section by `class_path` + `property` name, importing `value` from text, then persisting to the class's Default*.ini. `applied:true` on success; `message` carries the ... |
| `set_selected_assets` | Replace the Content Browser asset selection. `asset_paths` are package form (`/Game/AI/BP_Foo`). Returns the post-call selection so the caller can verify (UI may not have settled instantly â€” poll... |
| `set_selection` | Replace (or extend) the editor viewport's actor selection. `replace:true` (default) clears existing selection first; `false` adds to it. Returns the post-call selected names so the caller can verify. |
| `set_show_flag` | Toggle a viewport show flag (`Bones`, `Bounds`, `Collision`, `Wireframe`, `Lighting`). Equivalent to the `showflag.<name> <0\|1>` console command. |
| `set_view_mode` | Set the active level viewport's view mode. Accepts `Lit`, `Unlit`, `Wireframe`, `BrushWireframe`, `LightingOnly`, `LightComplexity`, `ShaderComplexity`, `StationaryLightOverlap`, `LightmapDensity`,... |
| `set_viewport_realtime` | Enable or disable realtime rendering in the active level viewport. `valid:false` means no viewport; `is_realtime` echoes the resulting state. Read counterpart: `get_viewport_realtime`. Requires a l... |
| `spawn_actor` | Spawn an actor of the given UClass in the current level. `class_path` is the full path (e.g. `/Script/Engine.StaticMeshActor` or a BP class like `/Game/AI/BP_Enemy.BP_Enemy_C`). All transform field... |
| `take_annotated_screenshot` | Capture the viewport + return structured spatial metadata (camera transform, selected actors, optional editor state) so a vision-capable agent can reason about scene contents without separate `get_... |
| `take_screenshot` | Capture a high-res screenshot to disk. `dest_path` is the output file; `width`/`height` default to the current viewport size if omitted. Routed via UE's `HighResShot` exec command. Requires a rende... |
| `take_viewport_screenshot` | Quick capture of the active editor viewport to disk at native resolution (`take_screenshot` adds optional `width`/`height`). Both route through HighResShot in-editor (the game-only `Shot` command d... |
| `ui_click` | Click an editor widget located by its `widget_path` (from `ui_list_widgets`). Injects a real synthetic mouse down+up at the widget's geometry center via the same path OS input takes, so Slate hit-t... |
| `ui_find` | Locate Slate widgets by visible text. Returns the same `{nodes, truncated}` shape as `ui_snapshot` but filtered: only widgets whose extracted text contains `text` (case-sensitive). `role` (optional... |
| `ui_focus_tab` | Focus (foreground) an editor dock tab by a substring of its label â€” the geometry-independent way to bring a panel forward (e.g. Details, Content Browser, a specific asset-editor tab) before readi... |
| `ui_list_widgets` | Walk the live editor's Slate widget tree (Selenium-style UI inspection). Returns `{ui_available, windows: [{title, is_modal, truncated, widgets: [{path, type, tag?, text?, visible, enabled, x, y, w... |
| `ui_snapshot` | Recursive Slate widget tree snapshot. Walks every visible top-level window (or only the one whose title contains `window`) and returns each widget as `{depth, widget_type, text, parent_window}`. `t... |
| `ui_type` | Type `text` into an editor widget located by its `widget_path` (from `ui_list_widgets`). Sets keyboard focus to the target, then injects one real synthetic character event per char via the same pat... |
| `world_pos_to_screen` | Project a 3D world position to the active level viewport's screen space. Returns `{valid, screen_x, screen_y, is_on_screen}`. `screen_x`/`screen_y` are normalized [0,1] across the viewport. `is_on_... |

## gameplay tag  (3)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_gameplay_tag` | Add a tag to the project's gameplay tag dictionary. `name` uses dot-separated form (e.g. `Status.Damage.Fire`). `comment` is optional. |
| `list_gameplay_tags` | Query the project's GameplayTagsManager. `filter` is an optional substring; empty returns every registered tag. |
| `read_ability_set` | Read a GAS ability-set DataAsset: every granted ability class + its level. |

## level sequence  (4)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_sequence_track` | Add a master track to a ULevelSequence (Sequencer). `track_class` is the short class name (`MovieSceneAudioTrack`, `MovieScene3DTransformTrack`). |
| `list_level_sequences` | List ULevelSequence assets under a content path. |
| `read_level_sequence` | Read a sequence's playback range (start/end seconds) and its top-level tracks. |
| `set_sequence_playback_range` | Set the playback range of a ULevelSequence in seconds (start <= end). |

## material  (9)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_material_expression` | Add a UMaterialExpression node to a Material graph. For Blueprint graph nodes use `add_node`. `expression_class` is the short class name like `MaterialExpressionConstant3Vector`, `MaterialExpressio... |
| `compile_material` | Recompile a material's shader code. UE normally compiles incrementally on edit; call this explicitly to flush pending recompiles or recover from a stuck shader compile state. |
| `connect_material_expressions` | Wire one expression's output pin to another expression's input pin, or to a master-material slot. Pass empty `to_node` to wire to a master slot (`to_pin` then names the slot, e.g. `BaseColor`, `Met... |
| `create_material` | Create a new UMaterial asset under `/Game/...` (default Surface / Opaque / DefaultLit). The material analogue of `create_blueprint`: a fresh material to populate with `add_material_expression` / `c... |
| `create_material_instance` | Create a UMaterialInstanceConstant under `/Game/...`, parented to `parent` (a material or material instance). The enabler for recreating material instances + the safe way to use `set_material_insta... |
| `list_materials` | List all UMaterial / UMaterialInstance assets under a content path. Mirrors `list_blueprints` but filters by class. Defaults to `/Game`. |
| `read_material` | Read a material's expression graph: every UMaterialExpression node (id, class, parameter name, x/y), every connection (from expression output â†’ expression input or master-material slot like BaseC... |
| `set_material_instance_parameter` | Override a parameter on a UMaterialInstanceConstant. For base-material defaults use `set_material_parameter`. `type` is `scalar`, `vector`, or `texture`; `value` is its text form (scalar `0.5`, vec... |
| `set_material_parameter` | Set the default value of a named scalar/vector parameter on a UMaterial (the base material). `value` is the parameter's text representation (scalar: `0.5`; vector: `(R=1,G=0,B=0,A=1)`). For per-ins... |

## niagara  (4)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `create_niagara_system` | Create a new (empty) UNiagaraSystem asset at the given path. Idempotent. |
| `list_niagara_systems` | List UNiagaraSystem assets under a content path (default `/Game`). |
| `read_niagara_system` | Read a UNiagaraSystem's emitter handles (each names an underlying UNiagaraEmitter) and its exposed user parameter names. |
| `set_niagara_parameter` | Override a user-exposed parameter on a UNiagaraSystem. `value` is the parameter's text form. |

## other  (1)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `preview_ops` | Validate an apply_ops batch without mutating anything. Walks the op array, parses each op's required fields, resolves named-slot refs against placeholder GUIDs, and uses read-only backend calls to ... |

## profiling  (3)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `get_stats` | Toggle a stat group overlay in the editor. `group` is the name passed to UE's `stat` command (`Unit`, `Game`, `GPU`, `Memory`). The name reads like a getter but this is actually a stateful TOGGLE ďż˝... |
| `start_profile` | Start a profiling capture. `mode` selects the backend: `stats` (UE's built-in stat group file, default), `insights` (UnrealInsights trace), or `csv` (CSVProfiler). Returns `{started, output_file}` ... |
| `stop_profile` | Stop the active profile capture and return its output file path. No-op if nothing is in progress. |

## read  (1)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `describe_k2node` | Introspect a K2 node class (custom or engine): given a class path like `/Script/BlueprintGraph.K2Node_FormatText` (or a short name like `K2Node_FormatText`), spawns a transient instance, calls Allo... |

## state tree  (5)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_state_tree_state` | Add a state to a UStateTree. NOT to be confused with `add_anim_state` (AnimBP state machine). Empty `parent_state_id` makes it a top-level state. Returns the new state id. |
| `compile_state_tree` | Compile a UStateTree. Returns `{compiled: true\|false}` â€” false means compile failed; check `read_output_log` for errors. |
| `list_state_trees` | List UStateTree assets under a content path (default `/Game`). |
| `read_state_tree` | Read a UStateTree's hierarchy + transitions: every state (id, name, parent) and every transition (from, to, trigger). |
| `set_state_tree_transition` | Define a transition between two UStateTree states. `trigger` names the event class or tick condition (e.g. `OnTick`, `OnEvent.Damage`). |

## tests  (1)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `run_automation_tests` | Trigger UE's automation test framework. `pattern` is the test-name wildcard (e.g. `BlueprintReader.*`, `*Smoke*`); empty means every registered test. The run is async â€” this tool kicks it off and... |

## widget  (5)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `add_widget` | Add a UWidget node (Button, TextBlock, etc.) to a UWidgetBlueprint's UMG tree. For Blueprint graph nodes use `add_node`. `widget_class` is the short class name (`Button`, `TextBlock`, `Image`, `Ver... |
| `bind_widget_event` | Bind a widget's event (e.g. `OnClicked` on a Button) to a named handler function in the widget blueprint's graph. If the handler function doesn't exist, it's created with the event's signature. Pai... |
| `compile_widget_blueprint` | Compile a UWidgetBlueprint. Equivalent to clicking Compile in the UMG designer. Returns `{compiled: true\|false}` â€” false means compile failed; check `read_output_log` for errors. |
| `read_widget_blueprint` | Read a UWidgetBlueprint's widget tree: every UWidget node (name, class, parent name) and the root widget's name. Mirrors `get_components` but for UMG. |
| `set_widget_property` | Set a UPROPERTY on a UWidget in a UWidgetBlueprint. For Blueprint component UPROPERTYs use `set_component_property`. `property_name` is the property's name as authored in C++ (`Text`, `ColorAndOpac... |
